content.problemStatement:
Gohan has found his way into Dr. Gero's lab. There, he finds a circuit. He starts to toy with it. He finds the inverse transverse function (Vin/Vout)(V_{in}/V_{out})(Vin‚Äã/Vout‚Äã) i.e **(itf)** of the circuit.

Dr. Gero finds out about this. He gives Gohan an sss-controller, through which he can randomly change the values of sss. He finds out that each value of **itf** can be achieved through multiple values of sss. But for a single particular value of **itf**, he finds out that this is not true. That is, just for this particular value of **itf**, there is only a single value of sss which achieves it.

To avoid punishment, Gohan must complete a task given to him by Dr.Gero, which is to find this particular value of **itf**. He needs your help in doing that.

**HINT** to solve these type of circuits. In these circuits, the capacitor and the inductor can be treated as normal resistors, with resistances as follows: The resistance of inductor is directly taken as **(s * L)** and that of capacitor is **1/(s * C)**.

###Input:


The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains 4 integers R,L,C,VinR, L, C, V_{in}R,L,C,Vin‚Äã, separated by single spaces.
###Output:
For each test case, print a single line containing the answer. Your answer will be judged right if it is at most 10‚àí210^{-2}10‚àí2 away from the correct answer.

###Constraints


1‚â§T‚â§21 \leq T \leq 21‚â§T‚â§2
1‚â§R‚â§1051 \leq R \leq 10^51‚â§R‚â§105
1‚â§L‚â§1051 \leq L \leq 10^51‚â§L‚â§105
1‚â§C‚â§1051 \leq C \leq 10^51‚â§C‚â§105
1‚â§Vin‚â§1091 \leq V_{in} \leq 10^91‚â§Vin‚Äã‚â§109
